# Design methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Recruitment rates

- Plausibility of reported recruitment rates

## Attrition rates

- Plausibility of reported attrition/dropout rates

## Randomisation methods

### Differences at baseline

- Carlisle method
- Baseline balance checks and variants

### Randomisation plausibility

- E.g., claimed to randomise students to groups for an intervention, but it would have to be at the level of classrooms or schools
- Binomial/multinomial distribution checks: only useful for testing weirdly unbalanced assignment, not too-perfectly balanced, as it's technically the most probable outcome
